title: Change Subitem Title
excerpt: Working on an OKR/KPI portfolio/dashboard and desperately want to change the title from Subitem to KPI.  But unable to do so :sad_but_relieved_face:.  I have admin access rights, is this a Monday.com config thing or some…

posts.author: meganmickle (Megan S Mickle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Working on an OKR/KPI portfolio/dashboard and desperately want to change the title from Subitem to KPI. But unable to do so . I have admin access rights, is this a Monday.com config thing or something different? will we ever be able to retitle the subitem like we can item level?

additionally, if anyone has practice or history using the portfolio templates for KPIs? I do not mind it actually and can easily create the dashboard, but curious if Monday.com has any KPI templates to look at and perhaps integrate into my work.

thanks!!

posts.author: JHolden1975 (Jason Holden)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to do this as well. I use Same Item Multiple Boards and would like to change the name of the subitem title so that it doesn’t automatically create a long list.
